title: Cobblemon EX
description: Adventure in a world of Pokemon!
body:
Adventure through the Minecraft world with Pokémon by your side.
With a rebalanced system focused on building and training your Pokémon, you can create a beautiful base to protect you from wild Pokémon.
With Cobbleriders, you can soar through the skies and dive in the sea, and build beautiful buildings with chipped.
battle your friends in mutiplayer, or adventure solo, the world of CobbleMon EX is open to you!
